item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n03","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response stays in direct decision-analysis mode and treats the prompt as metric trend diagnosis for a logistics-provider decision. It provides attribution checks, criteria for repair versus switching, cost factors, pilot design, trigger thresholds, and a clear recommended path. It does not fire triage or misclassify the situation as repeated local repair pressure."}
